title: Immersive Portals X Sable Bridge
description: A mod for (basic level of) compatibility between Immersive Portals and Sable.
body:
# NOTE: THIS MOD WILL BE DEPRICATED WITH THE RELEASE OF IPSABLE & IS UNSUITABLE FOR SABLE 2.0
IP Sable Link: https://github.com/r2smith141/IPSable

A mod for (a basic level of) compatibility between Immersive Portals & Sable. Special thanks to [Bunting chj](https://modrinth.com/user/Bunting_chj) for (most) of the code. Buy him a coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/chj990707

### Known bugs & issues:
- Sable physics objects can have visual artifacts behind portals
- Worlds can rarely be stuck on the saving screen when exiting with 2 portals and a sable physics object on the same chunk. _(The world still saves)_
- **Sable physics objects cannot go through portals**

Please report any issues on the [github](https://github.com/rebbyIf/ImmersivePortalSableBridge/issues)
